thesis: Apple's AI-driven upgrade cycle, fortress balance sheet, and services monetization create a multi-year growth runway despite near-term headwinds.
arguments: Apple Intelligence integration (2025-26) will trigger iPhone supercycle with 90%+ ecosystem retention amplifying hardware/services monetization
$160B cash reserves enable aggressive buybacks ($25B/quarter) while funding AI R&D and strategic acquisitions
Services segment (35%+ profit contribution) growing 20% YoY with 44% gross margins provides recession-resistant recurring revenue
Technical breakout above $200 resistance confirmed by MACD bullish crossover and 50/200 SMA golden cross signals institutional accumulation
Vision Pro spatial computing leadership establishes new $10B+ revenue vertical with 30%+ gross margin potential
